ds.title: Dataset
ds.upload_soon: Will go live once preparation is wired up.

upload.no_built: Nothing to upload — build the dataset first on the Prepare tab.
upload.no_managed: No training servers yet. Create one on the Servers tab.
upload.needs_init: Server is not initialized — finish setup first.
upload.fresh: This server already has the current build.
upload.stale: Server has an older build — re-upload required.
upload.never: Not uploaded to this server yet.

prompts.title: Clip prompts
prompts.intro: Edit captions per clip on the server. Auto-captioning fills only those left empty.
prompts.pull_hint: Pulls captions.json from the pod and overwrites local prompts. Only the first part of each video is used as the prompt for the source.

caption.title: Auto-write prompts
caption.intro: Generate captions for clips that don't have a manual prompt.
caption.all_done: All videos have manual prompts — no auto-captioning needed.
caption.missing: {{n}} of {{total}} videos have no prompt — they'll be auto-captioned.
caption.needs_upload: Upload the dataset to this server first.
caption.provider_gemini_no_key: Gemini Flash — set key in Settings
caption.instructions_placeholder: E.g. "focus on lighting and camera angle". Leave empty for default.
caption.override_hint: Replace existing prompts (including manual ones) with auto-generated captions.
caption.provider_qwen_hint: May take a while to run.
caption.done_hint: Manual prompts preserved, auto-generated captions filled in for the rest.

prep.macos_only: Local preparation is supported on macOS only.
prep.no_videos: No videos yet. Add some to start.
prep.prompt_placeholder: Describe this clip in plain text. Optional.
prep.build_outdated: Settings or videos changed — rebuild required.
prep.build_skipped_summary: Skipped {{n}} of {{total}} videos (too short for current length / aspect — they aren't included in the dataset).

servers.title: Training servers
servers.subtitle: GPU pods on RunPod managed by this app
servers.empty_hint: Spin up a GPU server to install LTX-2 and start training.
servers.no_key_title: Add your RunPod API key first
servers.no_key_hint: Open Settings, paste your RunPod API key, save — and come back here.
servers.external_hint: This server wasn't created in this app. Setup and training are only available for servers you create here.

detail.setup_intro: Install packages, sync the venv and download model weights. Runs autonomously over SSH.
detail.setup_done_hint: This server is ready for training.
detail.needs_hf: Add a HuggingFace token in Settings before running setup.
detail.delete_body: {{name}} will be permanently terminated on RunPod. Type the name to confirm.
detail.stop_body: {{name}} will stop billing the GPU but keep its disks.
detail.restart_body: {{name}} will be stopped and started again.

tr.title: Training
tr.no_managed: No training servers yet. Create one on the Servers tab.
tr.no_built: Build the dataset first on the Dataset → Prepare tab.
tr.needs_upload: Upload the dataset to this server first (Dataset → Upload).
tr.needs_init: Server is not initialized — run setup first.

pretrain.title: Pre-training
pretrain.intro: Compile prompts, validate clips and prepare the dataset for training.
pretrain.outdated: Dataset has changed since last pre-training — re-run required.

rank.label: LoRA rank
rank.hint: Higher rank = more capacity, more VRAM. Default depends on dataset size.

mode.label: Mode
mode.hint: What the model will learn to do.

steps.label: Training steps
steps.hint: More steps = longer training. Defaults scale with dataset size.

validation.label: Validation
validation.hint: Prompts (and optional reference images for i2v) used to preview how training is going.
validation.i2v_only: Reference images apply to i2v only.

flags.label: Optimization
flags.hint: Recommended ON for H100/H200/B200/B300, OFF for older GPUs.
flags.grad_ckpt_hint: Saves VRAM at the cost of slower steps.
flags.te_8bit_hint: Quantizes the text encoder to 8-bit to fit larger models.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hf_hint: Used to download LTX-2 weights and the text encoder from huggingface.co.
settings.llm_qwen: Qwen Omni — local, no key required
settings.gemini_hint: Optional. Required to use Gemini Flash for auto-captioning.
settings.ssh_hint: We generate a dedicated SSH key and register it with your RunPod account so the app can connect to your pods.
settings.no_runpod: Add your RunPod API key first.
